parameters.name: list_files
parameters.description: List files and folders in a Google Drive directory. Parameters: folder_id (ID of folder to list, default 'root'), max_results (number, default 20), query (optional name filter)

parameters.name: search_files
parameters.description: Search for files by name across all of Google Drive. Parameters: query (search term, required), max_results (number, default 20)

parameters.name: read_file
parameters.description: Read the content of a file by ID. Google Docs/Sheets/Slides are exported as plain text. Text files return content inline. Binary files return a view link. Parameters: file_id (required)

parameters.name: create_file
parameters.description: Create a new text file or Google Doc with content. Parameters: name (filename, required), content (file content, required), folder_id (optional parent folder ID), mime_type ('doc' for Google Doc, otherwise plain text)

value.name: ={{ $fromAI('name', 'Filename', 'string') }}
value.mime_type: ={{ $fromAI('mime_type', 'Use doc for Google Doc, otherwise plain text (optional)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: create_folder
parameters.description: Create a new folder in Google Drive. Parameters: name (folder name, required), parent_folder_id (optional parent folder ID)

parameters.name: delete_file
parameters.description: Delete a file or folder from Google Drive. Parameters: file_id (required)

value.file_id: ={{ $fromAI('file_id', 'The file or folder ID to delete', 'string') }}

parameters.name: share_file
parameters.description: Share a file or folder in Google Drive. Parameters: file_id (required), email (required for user sharing), role ('reader'/'writer'/'commenter', default 'reader'), type ('user' or 'anyone', default 'user')

value.file_id: ={{ $fromAI('file_id', 'The file or folder ID to share', 'string') }}
value.email: ={{ $fromAI('email', 'Email address to share with (required for user sharing)', 'string') }}
value.role: ={{ $fromAI('role', 'Permission role: reader, writer, or commenter (default reader)', 'string') }}
